semantic sentence of the question link to columns:
highest rated position -> position

The question is asking to determine the year she received her most recent highest rated position. Since we need to rank the positions numerically (where lower numbers indicate higher positions), we need to sort the "position" column (which contains ordinal data like "12th", "5th", "2nd") using the f_sort_column(position) operation with the order "small to large" (treating ordinal positions as numbers). This will show us the highest position first (most recent year where the highest position occurred).

Explanation: The highest rated positions in the table are "2nd" and "3rd". The most recent year where she achieved a "2nd" position was 2012, and the most recent year where she achieved a "3rd" position was 2009. Since "2nd" is higher than "3rd", the most recent highest rated position is "2nd" in 2012.
